---
title: "Package_Details"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Package_Details}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(fatherStay)
```

## Objective

## Imputation

We expect there to be some missing data in the predictor variables. Imputation is the best way to deal with them.
